episode_summary: Guest Zoe Lyons joins Dan, James, and Andy for facts on human endurance running and persistence hunting; Anthony Bourdain’s meteorite kitchen knife; how scientists collect semen from sharks and unusual shark biology; and Eddie the Eagle’s ski-jumping exploits and equipment mishaps.

facts.fact: Apparently researchers have discovered that humans may have evolved to run long distances as a result of their endurance pursuit hunting skills.
Celebrity chef Anthony Bourdain used to chop his onions with a knife from outer space.
The steps to get semen from a shark are number one, get the shark to lie on its back and number two, remove the semen from the shark. The first of these is by far the hardest.
The British Olympic skier, Eddie the Eagle, once came second to his own helmet.
